enforcement_resource_gap_analysis.interpretation: With 20 officers × 8 stops = 160 coverage slots and 119 CRITICAL/HIGH priority cells, the enforcement resource gap is 0 cells. All CRITICAL/HIGH zones are covered in this run.

optimization_method: Zone-aware OR-Tools CP-SAT (PRD-2): zones tightened to ~900 m eps. Routes further capped to MAX_ROUTE_BBOX_KM bounding box — excess cells deferred to next shift. Officer count capped to exactly n_officers (Fix #2).
